title: CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM - 211info
text: IMPACT NW DANCING TREE RESOURCE CENTER CITY OF PORTLAND WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers sewer, stormwater, and water bill discount program. Households must reapply for assistance every two years. Applicants with an Accessory Dwelling Unit (ADU) on their property with one water meter that serves both the primary home and the ADU are not eligible to participate in the discount program. Water and sewer customers: -Households earning less than 60% of the median family income (MFI) may receive a discount of up to $210.35 on a 90-day bill. -Households earning less than 30% of MFI may receive a discount of up to $336.58 on a 90-day bill. -Sewer only or customers on alternative billing cycles discount amount will vary. 10055 E Burnside Street Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: City of Portland Water single-family residential accounts. The account holder must reside at the property. Customers with an outstanding balance are still eligible to apply. Household income must not exceed 60% of the state median family income (MFI) Hours: Monday-Thursday 9am-4pm Email (503) 721-1740 3 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 721-1740 ext 3 Intake Yulia Kharytonova [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for application. Walk-ins are not accepted. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: -Proof of service address -Names and birthdates of all household members age 60 and older -Total gross monthly income for all household members over 18 -Proof of gross household income for last 30 days listed online) LANGUAGES: English, Russian, Ukrainian, Spanish, Czech, Slovak, Hmong, Lao, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: City of Portland SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-noon and 1pm-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Limited parking; street parking encouraged. Accessible by MAX blue line and TriMet bus line 20. Services: Discounted Sewer Service Discounted Water Service Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - CORE HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING AND RENTAL ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - RECOVERY SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - WORKER OF THE DAY INFORMATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY RESOURCE DESK LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - COMMUNITIES FOR SAFE KIDS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - AKA SCIENCE UTILITIES - ENERGY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IMPACT NW DANCING TREE RESOURCE CENTER
